name: QUANTA SERVICES, INC.
summary: PARTI OVERVIEW Quanta Services, Inc. (together with its subsidiaries, Quanta, we, us or our) is a leading provider of comprehensive infrastructure solutions for the electric and gas utility, power generation, large load center, manufacturing, communications, pipeline and energy industries in the United States, Canada, Australia and select other international markets.
